scripts.deploy: sh -c 'CFG=${WRANGLER_CONFIG:-$(if [ -f ./worker.wrangler.toml ]; then echo ./worker.wrangler.toml; else echo ./wrangler.toml; fi)}; wrangler deploy --config "$CFG"'
scripts.dev: sh -c 'CFG=${WRANGLER_CONFIG:-$(if [ -f ./worker.wrangler.toml ]; then echo ./worker.wrangler.toml; else echo ./wrangler.toml; fi)}; wrangler dev --config "$CFG"'
scripts.start: sh -c 'CFG=${WRANGLER_CONFIG:-$(if [ -f ./worker.wrangler.toml ]; then echo ./worker.wrangler.toml; else echo ./wrangler.toml; fi)}; wrangler dev --config "$CFG"'
